verdicts.note: Direction and magnitude hold ('championed... protections against ICE' is squarely pole_b), but the entire basis is one pamphlet sentence from one source, with no specifics of what she championed. Per the guide that is a single clear statement — medium, not high.

Sole evidence is the self-description 'completely pro-choice.' Emphatic, but it covers only the reproductive-rights element of an axis that also spans gender-affirming care, inclusive schools, and anti-discrimination law. One phrase on one element cannot place her at full-pole +2; +1 medium.

He states no housing policy at all — 'fight for housing affordability' is directionless, and the pole_b lean rests entirely on his organizing 'coalitions with tenant-rights advocates,' an affiliation rather than a position. That is indirect inference; low confidence.
